fields.name: logo
fields.label: Logo
fields.description: Path to logo image. Leave empty to show the site title instead.

fields.name: faviconsDir
fields.label: Favicons Directory
fields.description: Path with trailing slash, e.g. images/icons/

fields.name: blogDir
fields.label: Blog Directory
fields.description: Content directory for blog posts, e.g. posts

fields.name: defaultMode
fields.label: Default Color Mode
fields.description: Set to "light" or "dark". Leave empty for auto (follows system preference).

fields.name: ga_verify
fields.label: Google Site Verification
fields.description: Google Search Console verification meta tag value

fields.name: mainSections
fields.label: Main Sections
fields.description: Content sections shown on the homepage, e.g. ["blog", "docs"]

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
